title.#text: Planck per Electron Mass Light Speed

unit.title: Julian Year
unit.description: Acts as calendar years when added to or subtracted from dates, but as exactly 365.25 days when converted to other units. Use the yearfrac() function, instead of subtraction, to calculate the exact number of calendar years between two dates.

unit.title: Speed of Light (Natural Unit of Velocity)
Meter per Second to the Fourth (Snap)
Meter per Second to the Fifth (Crackle)
Meter per Second to the Sixth (Pop)
Atomic Unit of Magnetic Flux Density
Atomic Unit of Magnetic Dipole Moment
PostScript Point (DTP)
unit.description: The PostScript point, or desktop publishing point, is the screen-independent typographic unit commonly used in computer software and for digital printing. It is known as the big point (bp) in TeX.
